caption: A screen recording shows a web browser window displaying a concept map and a small video feed of a man. The man, wearing a dark baseball cap and a dark shirt, appears in a rectangular inset in the top right corner of the browser. The main area of the browser window contains a dark background with a complex network of colorful circular nodes connected by blue lines. These nodes contain icons and text, such as "Diverse Food," "Sustainable Food," and "Local Food." Several browser tabs are visible at the top, including ones titled "True Learning by Synergy!" and "Future of Society by Synergy!" The man in the video feed remains relatively still, speaking and looking toward the camera as the concept map remains static on the screen. The scene remains consistent throughout the sequence, with no significant movement or changes in the on-screen elements.
